evaluations.prompt: bump the version, update the changelog, and publish to pypi and ghcr
evaluations.expected_behavior: Bump pyproject.toml, sync release metadata, update CHANGELOG.md, verify the release surface, run release.yml with publish_pypi and publish_ghcr enabled, then verify the published package and GHCR manifest before recommending MCP Registry publish.

evaluations.prompt: the pypi release failed with invalid-publisher, figure it out
evaluations.expected_behavior: Inspect the workflow identity from the failure, compare it to the expected trusted-publisher identity for MRNAQA/sourceweave-web-search and release.yml, explain the mismatch, and tell the user what to fix in PyPI.

evaluations.prompt: publish this release everywhere and tell me the next command
evaluations.expected_behavior: Verify release readiness, run or instruct release.yml, confirm PyPI and GHCR artifacts, then give the publish-mcp-registry workflow command.
